rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JASON LHOTKA BY ELENA LHOTKA, et al VS. GEORAPHIC EXPEDITONS, INC., ALSO DOING BUSINESS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Geographic Expeditions, Inc. Motion To Strike 3rd Amended Complaint.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 26, 2011, line 9, Defendant Geographic Expeditions, Inc. Motion To Strike 3rd Amended Complaint. GRANTED AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND EXHIBITS REFERRING TO THE TRIAL AND APPELLATE COURT RULINGS ON THE ENFORCEABILITY OF THE ARBITRATION PROVISION. DENIED AS TO ALL OTHER REQUESTS. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JASON LHOTKA BY ELENA LHOTKA, et al VS. GEORAPHIC EXPEDITONS, INC., ALSO DOING BUSINESS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Geographic Expeditions, Inc. Demurrer To 3rd Amended Complaint.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 26, 2011, line 9, Defendant Geographic Expeditions, Inc. Demurrer To 3rd Amended Complaint. DEMURRER TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF SEPTEMBER 20 RULING ON MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DEMURRER TO 1ST-5TH AND 7TH-8TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. MANY OF THE ARGUMENTS RAISED WERE ALREADY CONSIDERED AS PART OF THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION TO THE THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT HEARD ON SEPTEMBER 20. THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUFFICIENTLY PLED. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SELMA OZER VS. FRANZ ZENZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 26, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANT TRYCO INC. MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE GENERAL OR SPECIFIC JURISDICTION. NO GENERAL JURISDICTION EXISTS BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HIGHLIGHT ANY SYSTEMATIC AND CONTINUING CONTACT FROM DEFENDANT. NO SPECIFIC JURISDICTION IS SHOWN. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PROVE THAT DEFENDANT PURPOSEFULLY DERIVED BENEFIT FROM CALIFORNIA ACTIVITIES OR PURPOSEFULLY AVAILED ITSELF OF THE PRIVILEGE OF CONDUCTING ACTIVITIES IN CALIFORNIA AND THE CAUSES OF ACTION AROSE OUT OF DEFENDANT'S CONTACTS WITH CALIFORNIA. PLAINTIFF MERELY SHOWS ATTENUATED CONTACTS WITH CALIFORNIA THAT ARE UNRELATED TO THIS LAWSUIT. THE FLUOR CONTRACT DOES NOT APPLY TO PLAINTIFF AND IS IRRELEVANT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF IS NEITHER A SIGNATORY NOR A THIRD PARTY BENEFICIARY. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CLAUDIA CARDINALLE et al VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, A NATIONAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 26, 2011, line 11, Plaintiff's Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction. DENIED. PLAINTIFFS DO NOT DEMONSTRATE THAT THEY ARE LIKELY TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS. SERVICE OF A NEW NOTICE OF DEFAULT WAS NOT NECESSARY. (CC SECTION 1058.5, CHAMPLAIE V. BAC HOME LOANS SERVICING, LP (E.D. CAL 2009 709 F SUPP 2ND 1029.) NO DEFECT EXISTS IN THE NOTICE OF DEFAULT. DEFENDANTS COMPLIED WITH THE COMPREHENSIVE CC SECTION 2924 SCHEME. A MERE AGENT CAN COMMENCE THE FORECLOSURE PROCESS. (SEE GOMES V. COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC. (2011) 192 CAL.APP.4TH 1149.) =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: LINSEY KRAMER VS. SPLASH TRANSPORTATION, INC. A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Protective Order And Req. For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 26, 2011, line 5, DEFENDANTs DR. PEPPER SNAPPLE GROUP, INC. A CORPORATION, MARIO HURTADO, SPLASH TRANSPORT, INC., THE AMERICAN BOTTLING CO (PREV. 7UP BOTTLING CO OF, Motion For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions. DENIED. ADMISSIBILITY OF EVIDENCE IS NOT A PREREQUISITE TO DISCOVERY. SEE VOLKSWAGEN OF AMERICA, INC. V. S.C. (2006) 139 CAL.APP.4TH 1481, 1490-1491. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,000. =(302/CWW)
